Marriott Bonvoy Boundless® Credit Card from Chase

Welcome Offer

Earn Up To 4 Free Night Awards + $100 in Airline Credits. Earn 3 Free Night Awards after spending $3,000 on eligible purchases within the first 3 months of account opening, and an additional 1 Free Night Award after spending $4,000 total on eligible purchases within 4 months of account opening. Free Night Award valued up to 50,000 points - that's a total value of up to 200,000 points. Plus, earn up to $100 in airline credits. Certain hotels have resort fees.

Annual Fee

$95 Annual Fee

Earning Rates

  • 17X - Earn up to 17 total Marriott Bonvoy® points for every $1 spent at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy®
  • 3X - Earn 3 Marriott Bonvoy® points for every $1 on the first $6,000 spent in combined purchases annually on gas stations, grocery stores and dining
  • 2X - Earn 2 Marriott Bonvoy® points for every $1 spent on all other purchases

Key Benefits

  • 1 Free Night Award - Receive 1 Free Night Award every year after your Card account anniversary. Award can be used for one night (redemption level at or under 35,000 Marriott Bonvoy points) at a participating hotel. Certain hotels have resort fees.
  • Automatic Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite Status - Enjoy automatic Silver Elite Status with Marriott Bonvoy each calendar year as a cardmember. You'll earn 10% more points on stays and enjoy priority late check out, where available.
  • Path to Gold - Earn Gold Elite Status when you spend $35,000 on purchases each calendar year
  • 15 Elite Night Credits - Each calendar year you can receive 15 Elite Night Credits towards the next level of Marriott Bonvoy Elite status. Limitations apply per Marriott Bonvoy member account. Terms apply.
  • Earn Elite Night Credits - Earn 1 credit toward Elite Status for every $5,000 you spend with no cap
